name: no_rearming_when_already_armed
description: Same velocity regime as fixture 05 (velocity well above threshold), but currently_armed=True. Inline logic guards arming with 'if not bot_state[symphony_id]["para_armed"]' -- once armed, function MUST NOT re-emit an arm transition regardless of velocity. Pins the idempotency rule. A wrong impl that ignores currently_armed would arm here and fail.
derivation: velocity = current_return - prev_return = 5.0 - 2.0 = 3.0. should_arm = (velocity >= para_threshold) AND (not currently_armed) = (3.0 >= 0.5) AND (not True) = True AND False = False. Velocity is still computed correctly; only the arm-transition is suppressed.
